steps.title: Identify the logical relationship
steps.content: The passage describes how the hardingfele produces sound through string vibration, then classifies it as a chordophone under that system. This is a cause-to-consequence structure.

steps.title: Select the consequence transition
steps.content:
The logical relationship is cause-effect. The blank needs a transition signaling that the classification follows logically from the sound-production mechanism.
  • Choice A — "Instead,": signals substitution or contrast, so fails. ✗
  • Choice B — "Furthermore,": signals addition of another idea, but the second sentence isn't adding a new point—it's drawing a conclusion, so fails. ✗
  • Choice C — "Thus,": signals that the chordophone classification is a logical result of producing sound through string vibration, so fits. ✓
  • Choice D — "Similarly,": signals parallel comparison between two separate things, so fails. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
